awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of amazingly awesome things regarding Preact ecosystem 🌟
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome things regarding Preact ecosystem :star2:

nodes.itemHTML: • Preact Neutralino TypeScript Starterstars1 - Starter project for building lightweight desktop applications with Preact and neutralino.js.
• Preact Compatstars951 - Use any React library with Preact (full examplestars52).
• Preact Render To Stringstars498 - Universal rendering.
• Preact Markupstars189 - Render HTML & Custom Elements as JSX & Components.
• Preact Portalstars175 - Render Preact components into (a) SPACE.
• Preact Richtextareastars35 - Simple HTML editor component.
• Preact Cyclestars127 - Functional-reactive paradigm for Preact.
• Preact MUIstars36 - The MUI CSS Preact library.
• Preact MDLstars185 - Use MDL as Preact components.
• Preact Photonstars166 - Build beautiful desktop UI with photon.
• Preact JSX Chaistars57 - JSX assertion testing (no DOM, right in Node).
• Preact Islandstars151 - Render your Preact component as a widget on any web page with ease.
• Preact Nominal Allocatorstars0 - A numerical input element that can also manipulated with two buttons (-/+).
• Electron TypeScript Preact Boilerplatestars3 - Electron starter project with TypeScript and Preact support, powered by esbuild.
• Nano Storesstars1.9k - A tiny (199 bytes) state manager with many atomic tree-shakable stores.
• Teafulstars656 - Tiny (800B), easy and powerful (P)React state management.
• Preact Chrome Extensionstars387 - A Full Feature Preact Chrome Extension Starter Kit.
• Preact Web Extensionstars17 - ⚡️ WebExtension Vite Starter Template with Preact.

• Windows 11 Web - Awe-amazing Windows 11 clone for the web! ⚡ (Github projectstars436).
• Preact Modern Startupperstars15 - PWA boilerplate with support for TypeScript, Goober, Unistore and Plop.
• Preact Transitioningstars27 - Exposes Preact components for easily implementing basic CSS animations and transitions.
• Slack (Discussion Forum)
• Cinemate - Movie Recommender System built with Preact and TypeScript. Backend written in Rust.
• Unistorestars2.9k - 350b / 650b state container with component actions for Preact & React.

• Pantstars18 - Mobile UI Components built on Preact (docs and demos). Ported from awesome Vue components of Vantstars20.3k.
• Preact Dockstars19 - Simple DnD and touch-enabled Dock for Preact apps.
• Preact Particlesstars4.2k - Lightweight component to easily add cool particles animations to websites.
• Passwords Fountain - modern & performant password manager interface which works everywhere (Github projectstars61).
• hooked-headstars312 - Hooks to manipulate the <head> section of the DOM. This has a subpackage with core preact support (using preact/hooks).
• GHFresh Monitor GitHub repository releases – Prerendering with Preact. Built with Preact Compat, TypeScript, Material-UI and Redux Toolkit. (GitHub Projectstars5).
• Preact App in ES6 without Babel or JSX (GitHub Projectstars6).

• Storybook Preact - Storybook for Preact is a UI development environment for your Preact components.
• Code and Commentstars16 - The application to add the comments to a file in Github (demo).
